name: kcd-map
description: Interactive map for Kingdom Come: Deliverance

scripts.app:build: vite build --outDir dist-app --emptyOutDir && deno compile --no-npm --node-modules-dir=none --no-terminal --icon app/icon.ico --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --allow-env --include dist-app --output kcd-live-map.exe app/main.ts
